wine_tours.name: Pagus Wine Tours - Valpolicella and Amarone
wine_tours.description: Verona-based operator with 20+ years of wine tourism experience. Half-day and full-day tours covering Valpolicella (Amarone), Soave, Lake Garda, and the Prosecco DOCG area. Groups, private tours, and e-bike options available. Winner of Best of Wine Tourism awards.
wine_tours.tip: Their Two Amarone Wineries half-day format gives the most producer-direct access for short visits.

wine_tours.name: Amarone Tours
wine_tours.address: Verona (vehicle pick-up from city centre), Italy
wine_tours.tour_type: Private winery tours - all-inclusive with transport
wine_tours.duration: Half-day (3 h, 2-3 wineries) or full-day (8 h, 4-5 wineries)
wine_tours.description: Verona-based with 10+ years specialising in Veneto wine tours. All-inclusive private tours with transport, English-speaking guide, and winery booking. Covers Valpolicella (Amarone), Soave, Bardolino, Lugana, and Prosecco. Fully customisable. Tel +39 389 9835269.
wine_tours.tip: Request the small winery format - visits to family-run estates unavailable on larger group tours.

wine_tours.name: Strada del Prosecco - Conegliano to Valdobbiadene
wine_tours.neighborhood: Valdobbiadene / Prosecco hills (UNESCO World Heritage Site)
wine_tours.tour_type: Self-drive wine road; guided variants available from local operators
wine_tours.description: Italy's first wine road (inaugurated 1966), running 58 km through the UNESCO World Heritage Prosecco hills between Conegliano and Valdobbiadene. Passes through Cartizze, Col San Martino, Refrontolo, Rolle, Susegana, and Vittorio Veneto. Consortium info at Villa Brandolini, Solighetto.
wine_tours.tip: Drive north from Conegliano - the westbound direction climbs to Cartizze's best viewpoints before noon before the haze builds.

wine_tours.name: Bike Station Valpolicella - E-Bike Wine Tour
wine_tours.address: Localita Gazzo 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_tours.tour_type: E-bike guided vineyard tour with Amarone tasting
wine_tours.description: Tenuta Santa Maria Valverde offers e-bike tours through Marano di Valpolicella vineyards using 7 Fantic-engine fat-tyre e-bikes. 2-hour guided experience includes cycling the estate, visiting the 17th-century cellar, and tasting Valpolicella, Ripasso, and Amarone with local food.
wine_tours.tip: Gift certificates available; ideal for couples or small groups wanting a physical activity paired with serious wine.

verified.address_quoted: Localita Gazzo, 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella VR

wine_tours.name: Distilleria Andrea Da Ponte - Distillery Tours
wine_tours.address: Via Primo Maggio 1, 31020 Corbanese di Tarzo (TV), Italy
wine_tours.tour_type: Grappa distillery tour - three format tiers
wine_tours.description: Grappa distillery and spirits tour in the Conegliano Valdobbiadene UNESCO World Heritage hills. Three tour formats for all experience levels. Located in the same territory as the Prosecco wine road, making it an ideal combined grappa + Prosecco day excursion.
wine_tours.tip: Combine with the Prosecco wine road - Da Ponte is 20 minutes from Valdobbiadene and 10 from Conegliano.

verified.address_quoted: Via Primo Maggio, 1 - 31020 Corbanese di Tarzo (TV)

wine_tours.name: BKWine Tours - Veneto Amarone, Valpolicella and Soave
wine_tours.tour_type: Expert-led group and private wine tour
wine_tours.description: Stockholm-based specialist wine tour company offering multi-day guided Veneto itineraries. Covers Valpolicella, Amarone, Soave, and optional Prosecco extensions. Led by certified wine professionals. Suitable for serious wine lovers and trade visitors.
wine_tours.tip: Their Soave extension visits producers in both the Classico zone and the broader DOC - important for understanding appellation fragmentation.

wine_tours.name: Grapperia Nardini - Guided Tours
wine_tours.address: Ponte Vecchio 2, 36061 Bassano del Grappa (VI), Italy
wine_tours.tour_type: Historic distillery guided tour with tasting
wine_tours.description: Guided tours of Italy's oldest grappa distillery (est. 1779) at the Ponte degli Alpini in Bassano del Grappa. Tours explore historic 18th-century production rooms and end with a tasting flight of Nardini grappas. Tue-Sat by reservation. Email visite@nardini.it.
wine_tours.tip: The tour includes several flights of stairs to historic rooms - check accessibility needs in advance.

wine_tours.name: Masi Monteleone21 - Open Winery Experience
wine_tours.address: Via Monteleone 26, 37015 Sant'Ambrogio di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_tours.tour_type: Open winery with fruttaio and appassimento tour
wine_tours.description: Masi officially opened Monteleone21 in 2025 as an 'open cellar' paradigm in Valpolicella Classica. Guided tours include the fruttaio (drying loft for Amarone appassimento), contemporary cellar spaces, Possessioni Serego Alighieri, and the Wine Bar 'Vino e Cucina'. The most complete appassimento experience in the region.
wine_tours.tip: Visit in October-December to see the fruttaio in active use - racks of drying Corvina, Rondinella, and Molinara grape bunches spread across the loft.
